verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. The kinase domain is cytoplasmic. Although LYN associates with membrane-proximal signaling complexes (BCR, FcεRI) in lymphocytes and mast cells, it does not reach the extracellular face via its own mechanism or co-trafficking with a TM partner that would expose its catalytic body. It is accessible only to intracellular substrates.
